page.title: Scans
page.subtitle: Scan queue across the projects you can access.
page.empty: No scans match the current filter.

progress.title: Scan in progress
progress.background_notice: Scan continues in the background — you can close this panel.

alerts.dt_unavailable: Dependency-Track is temporarily unavailable. Showing cached vulnerability data.

source.title: Start a scan
source.subtitle: Choose how to provide the source for {{project}}.

git.label: Configured Git URL
git.missing: This project has no Git URL. Upload a .zip or select a folder instead, or add a Git URL in project settings.

folder.label: Project folder
folder.hint: The folder is zipped in your browser before upload, up to {{max}}.
folder.too_large: The selected folder exceeds the {{max}} limit. Remove large directories and try again.
folder.noisy: Large directories detected: {{dirs}}. These will inflate the upload — consider excluding them.

errors.too_large: The archive is too large. The limit is 100 MiB.
errors.quota_exceeded: This project has reached its storage quota.
errors.bad_request: The upload could not be processed.
errors.network: Upload failed due to a network error. Please try again.
errors.unknown: The upload failed. Please try again.

close_codes.auth_expired: Session expired. Please sign in again.
close_codes.forbidden: You no longer have access to this scan.
